parameters.name: uprims
parameters.label: U Cross Sections
parameters.description: Empty by default, this field provides a way to specify a subset of the first input's faces and surfaces. Do so by selecting one or more primitive groups from this field's pop-up menu.

parameters.name: vprims
parameters.label: V Cross Sections
parameters.description: Empty by default, this field provides a way to specify a subset of V faces. If a second input exists, the primitive groups available for selection are taken from the second input. If only the first in

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: (Results only viewable for polygons and meshes).

parameters.name: keepshape
parameters.label: Preserve Shape
parameters.description: This parameter determines the precision of a linear skin (case c in the diagram). If enabled, it ensures that the generated surface goes through each cross-section. Here, a cross-section can be a face

parameters.name: closev
parameters.label: V Wrap
parameters.description: This menu (menu: Off, On, If primitive does) setting determines whether the surface should be wrapped in the V parametric direction. The options are to open (Off), close (On), or inherit the closure t

parameters.name: force
parameters.label: Use V Order
parameters.description: Enables or disables the use of the parameter. If the flag is , the skinned surface is built as a cubic (order 4) in V, unless fewer than four cross-sections for an open V or 3 cross-section for a clos

parameters.name: orderv
parameters.label: V Order
parameters.description: Specifies the order of the skinned surface when the flag is enabled. A NURB surface of order "n" can be constructed with at least n or n-1 cross-sections, depending on whether the surface is open or c

parameters.name: skinops
parameters.label: Skin
parameters.description: Can optionally skin subgroups of n primitives or every nth primitive in a cyclical manner.

parameters.name: inc
parameters.label: N
parameters.description: Determines the number of primitives to be either grouped or skipped. N2.

parameters.name: prim
parameters.label: Keep Primitives
parameters.description: Determines whether the input primitives will be preserved (On) or deleted from the output (Off).

parameters.name: polys
parameters.label: Output Polygons
parameters.description: If set, this flag instructs the program to convert the skinned surface(s) to polygons if the surface type is Mesh.
